widgets.title: Interfaces UP
widgets.extra_filter: name is 'interface_inventory' and interface_type is '6' and oper_status_label is 'up'

widgets.title: Interfaces Down
widgets.extra_filter: name is 'interface_inventory' and interface_type is '6' and oper_status_label is 'down'

expiry_status.title: Cert Status
expiry_status.htmlTemplate: {{ rowData.expiry_status }}

result.title: Port Status
result.htmlTemplate: {{ rowData.result }}

widgets.title: Top 20 CPU Usage Devices
widgets.extra_filter: collection is 'cpu' & cpu_usage is not empty

custom_columns.label: Uptime
custom_columns.htmlTemplate: {{ Number(rowData.uptime_sec) >= 86400 ? (Number(rowData.uptime_sec) / 86400).toFixed(2) + ' days' : Number(rowData.uptime_sec) >= 3600 ? (Number(rowData.uptime_sec) / 3600).toFixed(2) + ' hours' : Number(rowData.uptime_sec).toFixed(0) + ' seconds' }}

custom_columns.label: Status
custom_columns.htmlTemplate: {{ Number(rowData.uptime_sec) > 0 ? 'Up' : 'Down' }}

custom_columns.label: Out Discards
custom_columns.expr: out_discards_sum if out_discards_sum and out_discards_sum != '' else 0

widgets.title: Top 10 Highest PoE Usage Ports
widgets.extra_filter: collection is 'poe_port' and (poe_usage_percent is not empty or poe_power_consumption is not empty)

widgets.title: PoE Capacity Report
widgets.extra_filter: collection is 'poe_chassis' and timestamp is after -10min and poe_usage_percent is not Empty
